pipelineStages.name: Format Check
pipelineStages.description: Run Prettier to ensure code formatting consistency across the codebase

pipelineStages.name: Lint
pipelineStages.description: Run ESLint with TypeScript support for code quality and best practices

pipelineStages.name: Type Check
pipelineStages.description: Run TypeScript compiler in strict mode to catch type errors

pipelineStages.name: Unit Tests
pipelineStages.description: Run Jest with coverage threshold enforcement (80% minimum coverage)

pipelineStages.name: SAST
pipelineStages.description: Static Application Security Testing to identify security vulnerabilities in source code

pipelineStages.name: Secret Scan
pipelineStages.description: Scan for accidentally committed secrets, API keys, and credentials

pipelineStages.name: SCA
pipelineStages.description: Software Composition Analysis for dependency vulnerability scanning

pipelineStages.name: Build
pipelineStages.description: Run Next.js production build with optimized output

pipelineStages.name: Container Build
pipelineStages.description: Build Docker image with multi-stage Dockerfile for minimal image size

pipelineStages.name: Image Scan
pipelineStages.description: Scan container image for known vulnerabilities (CVEs)

pipelineStages.name: SBOM
pipelineStages.description: Generate Software Bill of Materials for supply chain transparency

pipelineStages.name: E2E Tests
pipelineStages.description: Run end-to-end tests against the built container

pipelineStages.name: Deploy
pipelineStages.description: Deploy to target environment with manual approval for production

pipelineStages.name: Post-Deploy
pipelineStages.description: Run health checks and smoke tests after deployment

securityTools.name: Semgrep
securityTools.description: Static analysis tool for finding security vulnerabilities and code quality issues

securityTools.name: Gitleaks
securityTools.description: Tool for detecting secrets, API keys, and passwords in git repositories

securityTools.name: Trivy
securityTools.description: Comprehensive scanner for vulnerabilities in containers, filesystems, and git repositories

securityTools.name: Snyk
securityTools.description: Developer-first security platform for finding and fixing vulnerabilities

securityTools.name: CycloneDX
securityTools.description: Lightweight SBOM standard for software supply chain transparency

securityTools.name: Docker Scout
securityTools.description: Container image analysis and vulnerability scanning

keyRotationPolicy: RSA keys used for JWT signing must be rotated every 90 days. Key rotation must be performed during maintenance windows with zero downtime using key ID (kid) header for seamless transition. Previous keys must be retained for 7 days after rotation to allow token grace periods.
